# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-10X_Podcast_-__Creation_Checklist

- **Fonte:** transcription_pdf_05-10X_Podcast_-__Creation_Checklist.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Research guest and best contact info
Identify what guests “win” is going to be
Come up with unique idea for episode
Contact guest and schedule recording
Plan overall show theme or takeaways
Write podcast outline and/or questions
EPISODE PREPARATION
Login early to ensure no tech issues
Record video and/or audio with backup
Cover all talking points, but stay flexible
Build credibility while remaining humble
Have fun and smile! (even if on audio)
Show support for the host and show
Ask audience to share, like, subscribe
RECORDING EPISODE
Adjust any needed levels and noise
Make initial big cuts (or outsource!)
Edit “ums” and “ahs” etc. (optional)
Add any intro, outro, ads, CTAs, etc
Listen to final podcast for quality check
Save files in MP3 (audio) MP4 (video)
EDITING AUDIO/VIDEO

PODCAST CREATION CHECKLIST
Create your next episode and stay consistent!
